name: @remino/jukette-monorepo
description: Workspace root for the jukette packages and docs app.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-core && npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-audio && npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-midi && npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-soundcloud && npm run build --workspace jukette && npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-docs
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-core && npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-audio && npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-midi && npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-soundcloud && npm run build --workspace jukette
scripts.docs:commit: export COMMIT="$(git rev-parse HEAD)" && cd deploy && git add . && git commit -m "Add build for $COMMIT"; true
scripts.docs:publish: npm run build --workspace @remino/jukette-docs && npm run docs:commit && npm run deploy && npm run docs:push
scripts.publish:workspaces: npm publish --workspace @remino/jukette-core --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish --workspace @remino/jukette-audio --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish --workspace @remino/jukette-midi --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish --workspace @remino/jukette-soundcloud --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish --workspace jukette --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/
scripts.publish:workspaces:dry-run: npm publish --workspace @remino/jukette-core --dry-run --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish --workspace @remino/jukette-audio --dry-run --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish --workspace @remino/jukette-midi --dry-run --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish --workspace @remino/jukette-soundcloud --dry-run --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/ && npm publish --workspace jukette --dry-run --access public --registry https://registry.npmjs.org/
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-audio && npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-midi && npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-soundcloud && npm run typecheck --workspace jukette && npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-docs
scripts.typecheck:packages: npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-core && npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-audio && npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-midi && npm run typecheck --workspace @remino/jukette-soundcloud && npm run typecheck --workspace jukette
